calendar.event: HDFC Bank + ICICI Bank Q4 results

tracker.title: US-Iran Ceasefire & Strait of Hormuz
tracker.india_impact: Drove 6% rally. Now fragile — US Navy in Hormuz, Iran threatened retaliation. Crude could spike to $110+ if cracks.
tracker.watch_for: Islamabad talks outcome. Hormuz incidents. Monday crude futures.

tracker.title: Q4 FY26 Earnings Season
tracker.india_impact: TCS beat but stock fell 2%. HDFC Bank Apr 18 is critical. Market needs earnings to justify rally.
tracker.watch_for: HDFC Bank NIM >3.65%. Infosys FY27 guidance.

tracker.title: Crude Oil Volatility
tracker.india_impact: Brent $95-97 still elevated. Singapore GRMs collapsed to -$9.4. Devastating for refiners.

tracker.title: RBI Monetary Policy
tracker.india_impact: Held at 5.25%. March CPI tomorrow is key for June cut hopes.

tracker.title: FII Flows & Rupee
tracker.india_impact: Rally suggests FII return. USD/INR stable at 93.
